_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of data catalog platform capabilities, including automated metadata harvesting, lineage visualization, search and discovery, classification, and glossary linkage.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI DQ domain. DQ-K-011 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DQ-A-004 (DQ, cosine: 0.325), AB-S-006 (AB, cosine: 0.318).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.0/10 (raw 0.405). Shared vocabulary: [discovery]. DCWF-only terms [ability, device, perform] vs WIDAI-only terms [automated, capabilities, catalog, classification, data, glossary] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.876 (P=0.898, R=0.855). P exceeds R by 0.043 — the DCWF element's 5 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 19 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.0%). "Ability to perform device discovery" and "Knowledge of data catalog platform capabilities, including automated metadata ha" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.345 < STS 0.405 (gap -0.060). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [ability, device, perform] and [automated, capabilities, catalog] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 4.5%. Shared tokens: [discovery]. DCWF-only: [ability, device, perform]. WIDAI-only: [automated, capabilities, catalog, classification, data, glossary].
